questions.question: If the 14th September of a year is Tuesday, then which day of the week will be on the 17th October of the same year? > यदि किसी वर्ष 14 सितम्बर को मंगलवार है, तो उसी वर्ष 17 अक्टूबर को सप्ताह का कौन सा दिन होगा?
questions.explanation: Days in September = 30 30 – 14=16 days in September. 16 + 17[days in October]=33, Odd days=Reminder after dividing 33 by 7=5 So, Tuesday+ 5 =Sunday. > सितंबर में दिन = 30 30 – 14=सितंबर में 16 दिन। 16 + 17[अक्टूबर में दिन]=33, विषम दिन=33 को 7 से भाग देने के बाद शेषफल=5 तो, मंगलवार+ 5 =रविवार।

questions.explanation: The logic followed here is 6×5×4= 120 5×4×3= 60 Similarly, 2×1×0 = 0

questions.question: When was Mahatma Gandhi first time attended the Indian national congress session? > महात्मा गांधी ने पहली बार भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस के अधिवेशन में भाग कब लिया था?
questions.explanation: Mahatma Gandhi first attended the Indian National Congress session in 1901, which was held in Calcutta. At this session, Gandhi interacted with prominent leaders like Gopal Krishna Gokhale, Lokmanya Tilak, and others. This marked his initial involvement with the Congress, although he became actively engaged in its activities later during India's freedom struggle. > महात्मा गांधी ने पहली बार 1901 में भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस सत्र में भाग लिया, जो कलकत्ता में आयोजित किया गया था। इस सत्र में, गांधी ने गोपाल कृष्ण गोखले, लोकमान्य तिलक और अन्य जैसे प्रमुख नेताओं के साथ बातचीत की। यह कांग्रेस के साथ उनकी प्रारंभिक भागीदारी को चिह्नित करता है, हालांकि वह बाद में भारत के स्वतंत्रता संग्राम के दौरान अपनी गतिविधियों में सक्रिय रूप से शामिल हो गए।

questions.question: Consider the following statements with regard to Satnami Movement of Central India. a. The movement was founded by Ghasidas. b. The movement was to improve the condition of leather workers. Which of the above statements is/are correct?
options: Both a and b>a और b दोनों
questions.explanation: Both statements are correct. Statement a: The Satnami Movement was indeed founded by Guru Ghasidas in the Chhattisgarh region of Central India during the early 19th century. He established the Satnam Panth ["Path of the True Name"] to promote social equality and spiritual awakening among marginalized communities. Statement b: The movement aimed to improve the condition of leather workers and other oppressed groups by advocating for ethical living, social reform, and rejection of caste-based discrimination. >दोनों कथन सही हैं। कथन a: सतनामी आंदोलन वास्तव में गुरु घासीदास द्वारा मध्य भारत के छत्तीसगढ़ क्षेत्र में 19वीं शताब्दी की शुरुआत में स्थापित किया गया था। उन्होंने हाशिए के समुदायों के बीच सामाजिक समानता और आध्यात्मिक जागृति को बढ़ावा देने के लिए सतनाम पंथ ["सच्चे नाम का मार्ग"] की स्थापना की। कथन b: आंदोलन का उद्देश्य नैतिक जीवन, सामाजिक सुधार और जाति-आधारित भेदभाव की अस्वीकृति की वकालत करके चमड़े के श्रमिकों और अन्य उत्पीड़ित समूहों की स्थिति में सुधार करना था।

questions.question: Which delhi ruler rebuked Chalisa and restored the prestige of the crown? > दिल्ली के किस शासक ने चालीसा को फटकार लगाई और ताज की प्रतिष्ठा बहाल की?
questions.explanation: Ghiyassuddin Balban, a ruler of the Delhi Sultanate, is known for abolishing the Chalisa [also known as Chahalgani], a group of 40 powerful Turkish nobles. This group had gained significant influence during the reign of earlier rulers, often undermining the authority of the Sultan. Balban, upon ascending the throne in 1266 CE, took strict measures to curb their power and restore the prestige of the crown. His policies of "iron and blood" emphasized strong central authority and discipline, ensuring the Sultanate's stability during his reign. > दिल्ली सल्तनत के शासक गयासुद्दीन बलबन को चालीसा [जिसे चहलगनी भी कहा जाता है] को खत्म करने के लिए जाना जाता है, जो 40 शक्तिशाली तुर्की रईसों का एक समूह है। इस समूह ने पहले के शासकों के शासनकाल के दौरान महत्वपूर्ण प्रभाव प्राप्त किया था, जो अक्सर सुल्तान के अधिकार को कम करते थे। 1266 ईस्वी में सिंहासन पर चढ़ने पर बलबन ने अपनी शक्ति पर अंकुश लगाने और ताज की प्रतिष्ठा को बहाल करने के लिए सख्त कदम उठाए। "लोहे और रक्त" की उनकी नीतियों ने मजबूत केंद्रीय अधिकार और अनुशासन पर जोर दिया, जिससे उनके शासनकाल के दौरान सल्तनत की स्थिरता सुनिश्चित हुई।

questions.question: Pulakeshin II assumed the title of ‘Dakshinapatheshvara’ [lord of the south] after defeating which of the following rulers of north India? > पुलकेशिन द्वितीय ने उत्तर भारत के निम्नलिखित शासकों में से किसे हराने के बाद 'दक्षिणापथेश्वर' [दक्षिण के स्वामी] की उपाधि धारण की?
questions.explanation: Pulakeshin II, a prominent ruler of the Chalukya dynasty, assumed the title of ‘Dakshinapatheshvara’ [Lord of the South] after defeating Harshavardhana, the ruler of North India. This significant victory occurred around 618 CE on the banks of the Narmada River, marking a major milestone in the history of the Deccan region. Pulakeshin II's triumph established the Chalukyas as a dominant power in southern India. > चालुक्य वंश के एक प्रमुख शासक पुलकेशिन द्वितीय ने उत्तर भारत के शासक हर्षवर्धन को हराने के बाद 'दक्षिणपथेश्वर' [दक्षिण के भगवान] की उपाधि धारण की। यह महत्वपूर्ण जीत नर्मदा नदी के तट पर 618CE के आसपास हुई, जो दक्कन क्षेत्र के इतिहास में एक प्रमुख मील का पत्थर है। पुलकेशी द्वितीय की विजय ने चालुक्यों को दक्षिणी भारत में एक प्रमुख शक्ति के रूप में स्थापित किया।

questions.question: In which of the following states is the Chu-Faat dance performed? > निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य में चू-फाट नृत्य किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: The Chu-Faat dance is performed in the state of Sikkim. It is a traditional dance that holds cultural and religious significance among the Lepcha community of Sikkim. This dance is performed during festivals to honour deities and express gratitude. > चू-फाट नृत्य सिक्किम राज्य में किया जाता है। यह एक पारंपरिक नृत्य है जो सिक्किम के लेप्चा समुदाय के बीच सांस्कृतिक और धार्मिक महत्व रखता है। यह नृत्य त्योहारों के दौरान देवताओं का सम्मान करने और आभार व्यक्त करने के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Which of the following pairs of festival and its state is correctly matched? > निम्नलिखित में से त्योहार और उसकी अवस्था का कौन सा जोड़ा सही सुमेलित है?
options: Bathukamma festival – Tamil Nadu>बथुकम्मा त्योहार - तमिलनाडु
Thrissur Pooram – Andhra Pradesh >त्रिशूर पूरम - आंध्र प्रदेश
questions.explanation: Jonbeel Mela is a unique festival celebrated in Assam, known for its barter system, where tribes exchange goods without monetary transactions. It takes place near the Jonbeel Lake. Bathukamma festival is celebrated in Telangana. It is dedicated to Goddess Gauri and features beautiful flower arrangements. Thrissur Pooram is celebrated in Kerala. It is renowned for its grand elephant processions and fireworks. Jallikattu is a traditional bull-taming sport celebrated during Pongal in Tamil Nadu. > जोनबील मेला असम में मनाया जाने वाला एक अनूठा त्योहार है, जो अपनी वस्तु विनिमय प्रणाली के लिए जाना जाता है, जहां जनजातियां मौद्रिक लेनदेन के बिना माल का आदान-प्रदान करती हैं। यह जोनबील झील के पास होता है। तेलंगाना में बाथुकम्मा उत्सव मनाया जाता है। यह देवी गौरी को समर्पित है और इसमें खूबसूरत फूलों की सजावट की जाती है। केरल में त्रिशूर पूरम मनाया जाता है। यह अपने भव्य हाथी जुलूस और आतिशबाजी के लिए प्रसिद्ध है। जल्लीकट्टू तमिलनाडु में पोंगल के दौरान मनाया जाने वाला एक पारंपरिक बैल-वशीकरण खेल है।

questions.question: Which of the following books was authored by Vishakhadatta? > निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी पुस्तक विशाखदत्त द्वारा लिखी गई थी?
questions.explanation: Mudrarakshasa is a famous Sanskrit play authored by Vishakhadatta. It is a historical drama that revolves around the clever political strategies employed by Chanakya [Kautilya] to establish Chandragupta Maurya on the throne during the Maurya Empire. The play is celebrated for its intricate plot and depiction of ancient Indian diplomacy. Yavanajataka is an ancient Sanskrit text attributed to Sphujidhvaja. It deals with astrology and astronomy, specifically focusing on the influence of celestial bodies on human life. It is considered one of the earliest texts on Hindu astrology. Kundalakesi is a Tamil epic attributed to Nathakuthanar. It belongs to the Sangam literature and narrates the story of Kundalakesi, a woman whose life is transformed after encountering various philosophical teachings. Silappatikaram Authored by Ilango Adigal, this is one of the five great epics of Tamil literature. It tells the tragic story of Kannagi, her husband Kovalan, and their experiences in Tamil society. >मुद्राराक्षस विशाखदत्त द्वारा लिखित एक प्रसिद्ध संस्कृत नाटक है। यह एक ऐतिहासिक नाटक है जो मौर्य साम्राज्य के दौरान चंद्रगुप्त मौर्य को सिंहासन पर स्थापित करने के लिए चाणक्य [कौटिल्य] द्वारा नियोजित चतुर राजनीतिक रणनीतियों के इर्द-गिर्द घूमती है। यह नाटक अपने जटिल कथानक और प्राचीन भारतीय कूटनीति के चित्रण के लिए मनाया जाता है। यवनजातक एक प्राचीन संस्कृत पाठ है जिसका श्रेय स्फुजिध्वज को दिया जाता है। यह ज्योतिष और खगोल विज्ञान से संबंधित है, विशेष रूप से मानव जीवन पर खगोलीय पिंडों के प्रभाव पर ध्यान केंद्रित करता है। इसे हिंदू ज्योतिष के शुरुआती ग्रंथों में से एक माना जाता है। कुंडलकेसी एक तमिल महाकाव्य है जिसका श्रेय नाथकुथानार को दिया जाता है। यह संगम साहित्य से संबंधित है और कुंडलकेसी की कहानी बताती है, एक महिला जिसका जीवन विभिन्न दार्शनिक शिक्षाओं का सामना करने के बाद बदल जाता है। इलंगो आदिगल द्वारा लिखित सिलप्पतिकारम तमिल साहित्य के पांच महान महाकाव्यों में से एक है। यह कन्नगी, उनके पति कोवलन और तमिल समाज में उनके अनुभवों की दुखद कहानी बताती है।

questions.question: Electrons are fundamental particles that make up matter. Who among the following is credited with this discovery? > इलेक्ट्रॉन मौलिक कण होते हैं जो पदार्थ बनाते हैं। निम्नलिखित में से किसे इस खोज का श्रेय दिया जाता है?
questions.explanation: JJ Thomson is credited with the discovery of the electron in 1897. He conducted experiments using a cathode ray tube and demonstrated the existence of negatively charged particles, which he named electrons. This groundbreaking discovery was a significant milestone in understanding the structure of the atom. Ernest Rutherford is known for his pioneering work in atomic structure. He discovered the nucleus and proposed the planetary model of the atom, famously conducting the gold foil experiment. Niels Bohr contributed significantly to atomic theory by proposing the Bohr model of the atom, which described electrons orbiting the nucleus in discrete energy levels. Marie Curie is renowned for her discoveries related to radioactivity and for isolating the elements radium and polonium. >जेजे थॉमसन को 1897 में इलेक्ट्रॉन की खोज का श्रेय दिया जाता है। उन्होंने कैथोड रे ट्यूब का उपयोग करके प्रयोग किए और नकारात्मक चार्ज कणों के अस्तित्व का प्रदर्शन किया, जिसे उन्होंने इलेक्ट्रॉनों का नाम दिया। यह अभूतपूर्व खोज परमाणु की संरचना को समझने में एक महत्वपूर्ण मील का पत्थर थी। अर्नेस्ट रदरफोर्ड परमाणु संरचना में अपने अग्रणी काम के लिए जाने जाते हैं। उन्होंने नाभिक की खोज की और परमाणु के ग्रह मॉडल का प्रस्ताव रखा, जो प्रसिद्ध रूप से सोने की पन्नी प्रयोग का संचालन करता है। नील्स बोर ने परमाणु के बोर मॉडल का प्रस्ताव करके परमाणु सिद्धांत में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान दिया, जिसमें असतत ऊर्जा स्तरों में नाभिक की परिक्रमा करने वाले इलेक्ट्रॉनों का वर्णन किया गया था। मैरी क्यूरी रेडियोधर्मिता से संबंधित अपनी खोजों और रेडियम और पोलोनियम तत्वों को अलग करने के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं।

questions.question: Trishulganga is a stream of which river? > त्रिशूलगंगा किस नदी की एक धारा है?
questions.explanation: Trishulganga is a stream associated with the Gandak River, which is one of the major rivers in northern India. It flows through regions of Nepal and Uttar Pradesh, and is a tributary of the Ganges. The Gandak comprises two streams, namely Kaligandak and Trishulganga. > त्रिशूलगंगा गंडक नदी से जुड़ी एक धारा है, जो उत्तर भारत की प्रमुख नदियों में से एक है। यह नेपाल और उत्तर प्रदेश के क्षेत्रों से होकर बहती है, और गंगा की एक सहायक नदी है। गंडक में दो धाराएँ शामिल हैं, कालीगंडक और त्रिशूलगंगा।

questions.question: Which is the highest peak of the peninsular plateau of India? > भारत के प्रायद्वीपीय पठार की सबसे ऊँची चोटी कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Anamudi, located in the Western Ghats in Kerala, is the highest peak of the Peninsular Plateau and also the tallest in South India, standing at an elevation of 2,695 meters [8,842 feet]. It is often referred to as the "Everest of South India" due to its prominence. While highest peak of Eastern Ghat is Jindhagada Peak and Mahendragiri is a notable peak in the Eastern Ghats, located in the state of Odisha, India. Standing at an elevation of approximately 1,501 meters [4,925 feet], it is the second-highest peak in Odisha after Deomali. > केरल में पश्चिमी घाट में स्थित अनामुडी, प्रायद्वीपीय पठार की सबसे ऊंची चोटी है और दक्षिण भारत में सबसे ऊंची है, जो 2,695 मीटर [8,842 फीट] की ऊंचाई पर स्थित है। इसकी प्रमुखता के कारण इसे अक्सर "दक्षिण भारत का एवरेस्ट" कहा जाता है। जबकि पूर्वी घाट की सबसे ऊँची चोटी जिंधगड़ा चोटी है और महेंद्रगिरि पूर्वी घाट में एक उल्लेखनीय चोटी है, जो भारत के ओडिशा राज्य में स्थित है। लगभग 1,501 मीटर [4,925 फीट] की ऊंचाई पर स्थित, यह देवमाली के बाद ओडिशा की दूसरी सबसे ऊंची चोटी है।

questions.question: ‘Indian Ocean Dipole [IOD]’ is characterised by a difference in sea surface temperature between which of the following? > 'इंडियन ओशन डाइपोल [IOD]' निम्नलिखित में से किसके बीच समुद्र की सतह के तापमान में अंतर की विशेषता है?
options: Tropical Western Indian Ocean and Tropical Eastern Pacific Ocean>उष्ण कटिबंधीय, पश्चिमी हिंद महासागर और उष्णकटिबंधीय पूर्वी प्रशांत महासागर
Tropical Eastern Indian Ocean and Tropical Eastern Pacific Ocean>उष्णकटिबंधीय पूर्वी हिंद महासागर और उष्णकटिबंधीय पूर्वी प्रशांत महासागर
Tropical Western Indian Ocean and Tropical Eastern Indian Ocean >उष्णकटिबंधीय पश्चिमी हिंद महासागर और उष्णकटिबंधीय पूर्वी हिंद महासागर
Tropical Western Indian Ocean and Tropical Western Pacific Ocean>उष्णकटिबंधीय पश्चिमी हिंद महासागर और उष्णकटिबंधीय पश्चिमी प्रशांत महासागर
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean Dipole [IOD] is characterized by a difference in sea surface temperatures between the western Indian Ocean [near the African coast] and the eastern Indian Ocean [near Indonesia and Australia]. It plays a crucial role in influencing monsoon patterns, rainfall, and climate variability in regions surrounding the Indian Ocean. > हिंद महासागर द्विध्रुवीय [IOD] पश्चिमी हिंद महासागर [अफ्रीकी तट के पास] और पूर्वी हिंद महासागर [इंडोनेशिया और ऑस्ट्रेलिया के पास] के बीच समुद्र की सतह के तापमान में अंतर की विशेषता है। यह हिंद महासागर के आसपास के क्षेत्रों में मानसून के पैटर्न, वर्षा और जलवायु परिवर्तनशीलता को प्रभावित करने में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाता है।

questions.question: Which of the following islands is known for having the only active volcano in India? > निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा द्वीप भारत में एकमात्र सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी होने के लिए जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Barren Island, located in the Andaman Sea in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, is home to the only active volcano in India. This volcano has experienced several eruptions, with the most recent activity reported in 2017. It is an uninhabited island, and its volcanic activity makes it a unique geological feature in the country. > अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह में अंडमान सागर में स्थित बैरन द्वीप, भारत में एकमात्र सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी का घर है। इस ज्वालामुखी ने कई विस्फोटों का अनुभव किया है, जिसमें सबसे हालिया गतिविधि 2017 में बताई गई है। यह एक निर्जन द्वीप है, और इसकी ज्वालामुखीय गतिविधि इसे देश में एक अनूठी भूवैज्ञानिक विशेषता बनाती है।

questions.question: Which of the following Articles of the Indian Constitution explicitly prohibits the State from making any law that violates Fundamental Rights?
questions.explanation: Article 13 explicitly prohibits the State from making any laws that infringe upon or violate Fundamental Rights guaranteed under Part III of the Constitution. It declares that any law inconsistent with Fundamental Rights shall be void to the extent of its inconsistency. This article plays a crucial role in safeguarding individual rights against legislative actions that may undermine them.

questions.question: Fundamental Duties was borrowed from which of the following countries to Indian constitution? > मौलिक कर्तव्यों को निम्नलिखित में से किस देश से भारतीय संविधान में उधार लिया गया था?
questions.explanation: The concept of Fundamental Duties in the Indian Constitution was borrowed from the USSR [Union of Soviet Socialist Republics]. These duties were introduced through the 42nd Amendment Act, 1976, based on the recommendations of the Swaran Singh Committee. They are enshrined in Article 51A under Part IV-A of the Constitution. >भारतीय संविधान में मौलिक कर्तव्यों की अवधारणा यूएसएसआर [सोवियत समाजवादी गणराज्य संघ] से उधार ली गई थी। इन कर्तव्यों को स्वर्ण सिंह समिति की सिफारिशों के आधार पर 42वें संशोधन अधिनियम, 1976 के माध्यम से पेश किया गया था। वे संविधान के भाग IV-A के तहत अनुच्छेद 51A में निहित हैं।

questions.question: Goblet cells play a crucial role in maintaining the health of various organs. Where goblet cells are primarily located in the human body? > गॉब्लेट कोशिकाएं विभिन्न अंगों के स्वास्थ्य को बनाए रखने में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाती हैं। गॉब्लेट कोशिकाएं मुख्य रूप से मानव शरीर में कहाँ स्थित होती हैं?
questions.explanation: Goblet cells are a specialized type of epithelial cell that secrete mucins, which are significant components of mucus. They are most often found in the respiratory and gastrointestinal tracts, where they make up part of the surface epithelium in the respiratory system, goblet cells aid in trapping particles and pathogens, while in the gastrointestinal tract, they safeguard against digestive enzymes and facilitate the movement of food. > गॉब्लेट कोशिकाएं एक विशेष प्रकार की उपकला कोशिका होती हैं जो श्लेष्म का स्राव करती हैं, जो म्यूकस के महत्वपूर्ण घटक हैं। वे अक्सर श्वसन और जठरांत्र संबंधी मार्ग में पाए जाते हैं, जहां वे सतह उपकला का हिस्सा बनाते हैं। श्वसन प्रणाली में, गॉब्लेट कोशिकाएं कणों और रोगजनकों को फंसाने में सहायता करती हैं, जबकि जठरांत्र संबंधी मार्ग में, वे पाचन एंजाइमों से रक्षा करते हैं और भोजन की गति को सुविधाजनक बनाते हैं।

questions.question: What is the name of the disease that can be caused by Vitamin D deficiency in children? > बच्चों में विटामिन D की कमी से होने वाली बीमारी का नाम क्या है?
questions.explanation: The disease caused by Vitamin D deficiency in children is called rickets. This condition leads to soft and weak bones, which can result in skeletal deformities like bowed legs, delayed growth, and pain in the bones. Ensuring adequate Vitamin D intake through sunlight, diet, or supplements can help prevent this condition. While osteoporosis relates to bone weakening [mostly in adults] and scurvy is caused by Vitamin C deficiency and Bleeding diathesis is a condition associated with abnormal bleeding due to deficiencies in Vitamin K or specific clotting factor disorders like hemophilia. >बच्चों में विटामिन डी की कमी से होने वाले रोग को रिकेट्स कहा जाता है। यह स्थिति नरम और कमजोर हड्डियों की ओर ले जाती है, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप कंकाल की विकृति हो सकती है जैसे झुके हुए पैर, देरी से विकास और हड्डियों में दर्द। सूरज की रोशनी, आहार या पूरक आहार के माध्यम से पर्याप्त विटामिन डी का सेवन सुनिश्चित करने से इस स्थिति को रोकने में मदद मिल सकती है। जबकि ऑस्टियोपोरोसिस हड्डी के कमजोर होने [ज्यादातर वयस्कों में] से संबंधित है और स्कर्वी विटामिन c की कमी के कारण होता है और रक्तस्राव डायथेसिस विटामिन k में कमी या हीमोफिलिया जैसे विशिष्ट थक्के कारक विकारों के कारण असामान्य रक्तस्राव से जुड़ी स्थिति है।

questions.question: What was the major economic challenge mentioned in the Third Five Year Plan [1961-1966]?
options: Focus on economic crisis management and policy adjustments
questions.explanation: The Third Five Year Plan [1961–1966] faced significant disruptions due to external and internal crises, including the Indo-China war [1962] and the Indo-Pak war [1965]. These conflicts led to increased wartime expenditure and resource allocation, which diverted attention from the plan's original goals of self-reliance in food grains and industrial development. Additionally, severe droughts and inflation further compounded the economic challenges during this period.

questions.question: In August 2024, the Banking Laws [Amendment] Bill was introduced in the Lok Sabha. This Bill proposes changes to which of the following Acts?
options: Public Debt Act, 1944 / Government Securities Act, 2006
questions.explanation: The Banking Laws [Amendment] Bill, 2024, introduced in the Lok Sabha, proposes changes to several acts, including the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, Banking Regulation Act, 1949, State Bank of India Act, 1955 and Banking Companies [Acquisition and Transfer of Undertakings] Acts, 1970 and 1980. It aims to modernize banking regulations and improve governance standards in the banking sector.

questions.question: Why does the milkman add a very small amount of baking soda to fresh milk? > दूधवाला ताजे दूध में बेकिंग सोडा की बहुत कम मात्रा क्यों मिलाता है?
options: To reduce the pH of the fresh milk from 6 to slightly alkaline>ताजे दूध के पीएच को 6 से थोड़ा क्षारीय तक कम करने के लिए
To reduce the pH of the fresh milk from 6 to slightly more acidic>ताजे दूध के पीएच को 6 से थोड़ा अधिक अम्लीय तक कम करने के लिए
To maintain the pH of the fresh milk at 6 for a longer time >ताजा दूध के पीएच को 6 पर लंबे समय तक बनाए रखने के लिए
To increase the pH of the fresh milk from 6 to slightly alkaline>ताजे दूध के पीएच को 6 से थोड़ा क्षारीय तक बढ़ाने के लिए
questions.explanation: Adding a small amount of baking soda to fresh milk makes it slightly alkaline by increasing the pH. This slows down the process of bacterial growth and souring, helping the milk stay fresh for a longer period. Baking soda acts as a preservative in this case. > ताजे दूध में थोड़ी मात्रा में बेकिंग सोडा मिलाने से पीएच बढ़ जाता है। यह बैक्टीरिया के विकास और खट्टे होने की प्रक्रिया को धीमा कर देता है, जिससे दूध को लंबे समय तक ताजा रहने में मदद मिलती है। बेकिंग सोडा इस मामले में एक संरक्षक के रूप में कार्य करता है।

questions.question: Which of the following metals is extracted from the Monazite sand in plenty in India? > निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी धातु भारत में मोनाजाइट रेत से प्रचुर मात्रा में निकाली जाती है?
questions.explanation: The metal thorium is extracted in significant quantities from Monazite sand in India. Monazite is a phosphate mineral that contains thorium along with rare earth elements like cerium, lanthanum, and neodymium. Thorium is particularly important for India's nuclear energy program due to its potential as a fuel for nuclear reactors. > भारत में मोनाजाइट बालू से पर्याप्त मात्रा में थोरियम धातु का निष्कासित किया जाता है। मोनाजाइट एक फॉस्फेट खनिज है जिसमें थोरियम के साथ दुर्लभ पृथ्वी तत्व जैसे सेरियम, लैंथेनम और नियोडिमियम होते हैं। थोरियम भारत के परमाणु ऊर्जा कार्यक्रम के लिए विशेष रूप से महत्वपूर्ण है क्योंकि परमाणु रिएक्टरों के लिए ईंधन के रूप में इसकी क्षमता है।

questions.question: The unit 'foot' belongs to which of the following systems of units? > इकाई 'फुट' निम्नलिखित में से किस इकाई की प्रणाली से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: The unit "foot" belongs to the FPS system [Foot-Pound-Second system], which is a system of units used primarily in engineering and the Imperial system. It includes the foot as a unit of length, the pound as a unit of weight, and the second as a unit of time. This system is still used in some countries like the United States, although it is less common internationally compared to the Metric system. It is a unit of length, equivalent to 12 inches or approximately 0.3048 meters. >इकाई "फुट" एफपीएस प्रणाली [फुट-पाउंड-सेकंड सिस्टम] से संबंधित है, जो मुख्य रूप से इंजीनियरिंग और इंपीरियल प्रणाली में उपयोग की जाने वाली इकाइयों की एक प्रणाली है। इसमें फुट को लंबाई की एक इकाई के रूप में, पाउंड को वजन की एक इकाई के रूप में और सेकंड को समय की इकाई के रूप में शामिल किया गया है। इस प्रणाली का उपयोग अभी भी संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका जैसे कुछ देशों में किया जाता है, हालांकि यह मीट्रिक प्रणाली की तुलना में अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर कम आम है। यह लंबाई की एक इकाई है, जो 12 इंच या लगभग 0.3048 मीटर के बराबर है।

questions.question: Deepam 2.0 scheme to provide free gas cylinders to eligible families was recently launched by which state government? > पात्र परिवारों को मुफ्त गैस सिलेंडर प्रदान करने के लिए दीपम 2.0 योजना हाल ही में किस राज्य सरकार द्वारा शुरू की गई थी?
questions.explanation: The Deepam 2.0 scheme, which aims to provide free gas cylinders to eligible families, was recently launched by the Andhra Pradesh state government. This initiative is part of the state's efforts to support financially unstable households and promote cleaner cooking methods. > दीपम 2.0 योजना, जिसका उद्देश्य पात्र परिवारों को मुफ्त गैस सिलेंडर प्रदान करना है, हाल ही में आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य सरकार द्वारा शुरू की गई थी। यह पहल आर्थिक रूप से अस्थिर परिवारों का समर्थन करने और खाना पकाने के स्वच्छ तरीकों को बढ़ावा देने के राज्य के प्रयासों का हिस्सा है।

questions.question: Which of the following country has introduced a bill with objective to ban social media access for children less than 16 years of age? > निम्नलिखित में से किस देश ने 16 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए सोशल मीडिया एक्सेस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने के उद्देश्य से एक विधेयक पेश किया है?
questions.explanation: Australia recently introduced a bill aimed at banning social media access for children less than 16 years of age. This legislation, known as the Social Media Minimum Age bill, mandates strict age verification measures and imposes hefty fines on companies that fail to comply. It is considered a landmark move to protect young people's mental health and well-being. > ऑस्ट्रेलिया ने हाल ही में 16 साल से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए सोशल मीडिया एक्सेस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने के उद्देश्य से एक बिल पेश किया था। सोशल मीडिया मिनिमम एज बिल के रूप में जाना जाने वाला यह कानून, सख्त आयु सत्यापन उपायों को अनिवार्य करता है और अनुपालन करने में विफल रहने वाली कंपनियों पर भारी जुर्माना लगाता है। इसे युवाओं के मानसिक स्वास्थ्य और कल्याण की रक्षा के लिए एक ऐतिहासिक कदम माना जाता है।

questions.question: Who was recently awarded with Fiji’s highest civilian award “Honorary Officer of the Order of Fiji”? > हाल ही में फिजी के सर्वोच्च नागरिक पुरस्कार "मानद अधिकारी ऑफ द ऑर्डर ऑफ फिजी" से किसे सम्मानित किया गया?
options: Sri Sri Ravi Shankar >श्री श्री रविशंकर
questions.explanation: Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar, the global spiritual leader and founder of The Art of Living, was recently honoured with Fiji's highest civilian award, the "Honorary Officer of the Order of Fiji." This recognition was bestowed upon him by Fiji's President, Ratu Wiliame M. Katonivere, on October 26, 2024, in acknowledgment of his contributions to global peace, unity, and community work. > वैश्विक आध्यात्मिक नेता और आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग के संस्थापक गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर को हाल ही में फिजी के सर्वोच्च नागरिक पुरस्कार, "मानद अधिकारी ऑफ द ऑर्डर ऑफ फिजी" से सम्मानित किया गया। यह मान्यता उन्हें फिजी के राष्ट्रपति, रातू विलियम एम. काटोनिवेरे ने 26 अक्टूबर, 2024 को वैश्विक शांति, एकता और सामुदायिक कार्यों में उनके योगदान की स्वीकृति में प्रदान की थी।

questions.question: Which country will host the Commonwealth Games in 2026 after Victoria, Australia, withdrew due to rising costs? > बढ़ती लागत के कारण विक्टोरिया, ऑस्ट्रेलिया के हटने के बाद 2026 में कौन सा देश राष्ट्रमंडल खेलों की मेजबानी करेगा?
questions.explanation: Scotland will hold the Commonwealth Games 2026 that were hosted in Australia's Victoria State after Victoria’s withdrew due to costs. Glasgow, which hosted the event 10 years ago, will do so again, though some sports will need to be dropped as the Commonwealth Games Federation aims to reduce costs to make the competition more sustainable in the future. > स्कॉटलैंड राष्ट्रमंडल खेलों 2026 का आयोजन करेगा जो ऑस्ट्रेलिया के विक्टोरिया राज्य में आयोजित किए गए थे, क्योंकि विक्टोरिया ने लागत के कारण नाम वापस ले लिया था। ग्लास्गो, जिसने 10 साल पहले इस आयोजन की मेजबानी की थी, फिर से ऐसा करेगा, हालांकि कुछ खेलों को हटाने की आवश्यकता होगी क्योंकि राष्ट्रमंडल खेल महासंघ का लक्ष्य भविष्य में प्रतियोगिता को और अधिक टिकाऊ बनाने के लिए लागत कम करना है।

questions.question: Cost price of a fan is increased by 30%. A retailer who revised the selling price of the fan to maintain the same profit percentage, he noted that he got Rs. 45 more in profit on selling one fan after he revised the selling price. What is the new profit in rupees? > एक पंखे का क्रय मूल्य 30% बढ़ जाता है। एक खुदरा विक्रेता ने लाभ प्रतिशत को समान बनाए रखने के लिए पंखे के विक्रय मूल्य को संशोधित किया, उसने पाया कि विक्रय मूल्य को संशोधित करने के बाद उसे एक पंखा बेचने पर 45 रुपये अधिक लाभ हुआ। रुपये में नया लाभ क्या है?
questions.explanation: When, CP is increased by 30% and we want to maintain profit % as same as earlier, we will have to increase the SP also by 30% and in this case profit % will also be increased by 30%, thus difference of profit in both case = 30% of original profit = Rs. 45 So, 100% of original profit = Rs. 150 And New Profit = 150 + 45 = Rs. 195 > जब, क्रय मूल्य में 30% की वृद्धि होती है और हम लाभ प्रतिशत को पहले जैसा ही बनाए रखना चाहते हैं, तो हमें विक्रय मूल्य में भी 30% की वृद्धि करनी होगी और इस स्थिति में लाभ प्रतिशत भी 30% बढ़ जाएगा, इस प्रकार दोनों मामलों में लाभ का अंतर = मूल लाभ का 30% = 45 रुपये अतः, मूल लाभ का 100% = 150 रुपये और नया लाभ = 150 + 45 = 195 रुपये

questions.question: X, Y and Z have 50, ‘a’ and ‘b’ balls with them respectively. If Y gives 60 balls to X, he is left with half as many balls as Z. What is value of a : b? > X, Y और Z के पास क्रमशः 50, ‘a’ और ‘b’ गेंदें हैं। यदि Y, X को 60 गेंदें देता है, तो उसके पास Z की आधी गेंदें बचती हैं। यदि उनके पास कुल मिलाकर 100 गेंदें और होतीं, तो उनमें से प्रत्येक के पास औसतन 120 गेंदें होतीं। a : b का मान क्या है?

questions.question: Vinay invested ₹P in a scheme A offering simple interest at 15% per annum for two years. He invested the whole amount he received from scheme A, in another scheme B offering simple interest at 20% per annum for two years. If the difference between the interest earned from scheme A and scheme B was ₹2002, what is the value of P?
questions.explanation: Let P = 100, Amount after two years @15% p.a. simple interest as per scheme A = 100 + ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063a528234.06402820.gif) = 130, thus interest earned = 30 When received amount from scheme A; i.e. 130 is invested in scheme B, then amount after 2 years = 130 + ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063a6d66e1.15168725.gif) = 182, thus interest earned = 52 According to question, difference between interest earned in both schemes = [52 – 30] = 22→ ₹2002 1→₹91 100→₹9100 = P

questions.question: Pipe A takes twice of the time required by pipe B to fill the tank individually. When an outlet pipe C is opened simultaneously with pipe A & pipe B, it takes ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063ccec556.77354582.gif) more time to fill the empty tank than it takes when only pipe A & pipe B are opened together. If it takes 25 hours to fill the tank when all the three pipes are opened simultaneously, in what time [in hours] will pipe C empty the full tank operating alone?
questions.explanation: Time ratio of [A+B-C] & [A+B] = 7:4, So, efficiency ratio of [A+B-C] & [A+B] = 4:7; i.e. drainage efficiency of pipe C = 7 – 4 = 3 unit/hour Total work = efficiency of [A+B–C] × 25 = 4×25 = 100 unit Hence, time taken by pipe C to empty the full tank = ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063cea0567.05293488.gif) = 33 ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063d18b300.75649149.gif) hours

questions.question: If 8A5146B is divisible by 88, then what is the value of [A2×B]? > यदि 8A5146B, 88 से विभाज्य है, तो [A2×B] का मान क्या है?
questions.explanation: As 8A5146B is divisible by 88; i.e. number will also be divisible by both 8 & 11. For 8’s divisibility: number formed using last three digits; i.e. 46B should be divisible by 8. So, B = 4. For 11’s divisibility: difference between the sum of digits at odd places and sum of digits at even places = 0/multiple of 11 i.e. [4 + 4 + 5 + 8] – [6 + 1 + A] = 0/11 14 – A = 11 ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997063db9a4b2.25507768.gif) A = 3 Hence, A2×B=32 × 4 = 36 > चूँकि 8A5146B, 88 से विभाज्य है; यानी यह संख्या 8 और 11 दोनों से भी विभाज्य होगी। 8 की विभाज्यता के लिए: अंतिम तीन अंकों का उपयोग करके बनाई गई संख्या; यानी 46B, 8 से विभाज्य होनी चाहिए। इसलिए, B = 4। 11 की विभाज्यता के लिए: विषम स्थानों पर अंकों के योग और सम स्थानों पर अंकों के योग के बीच का अंतर = 0/11 का गुणज यानी [4 + 4 + 5 + 8] – [6 + 1 + A] = 0/11 14 – A = 11 ⇒ A = 3 इसलिए, A2×B=32 × 4 = 36

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The error lies in segment: suddenly bursted. Explanation: • The verb "bursted" is incorrect. • "Burst" is an irregular verb with the same form in base [V1], past [V2], and past participle [V3]: burst – burst – burst. • These verbs have same V1 / V2 / V3 :- Wed, Cost Set, Bet, Bid, Thrust, Hit, Cut, Slit, Spread, Read, Burst, Quit, Shut, Shed, Cast, Rid, Telecast, Broadcast, Overcast, Forecast etc. • Since the sentence refers to a past action, the correct past form burst should be used. Corrected Sentence: "The balloon suddenly burst during the party."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The manager's explanation was so __________ that no one had any doubts left.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Lucid Explanation: The word "lucid" is the most appropriate choice here. It means clear, easy to understand, or expressed in a way that makes things obvious, which fits the context of the manager's explanation removing all doubts. Here are the meanings and examples of all options: • Harmonious – सामंजस्यपूर्ण – Means forming a pleasing or consistent whole. Example: The team worked in a harmonious manner to complete the project. • Vague – अस्पष्ट – Means unclear or not specific. Example: His explanation was vague, leaving everyone confused. • Lucid – स्पष्ट – Means clear and easy to understand. Example: The manager’s lucid explanation clarified all the issues. • Obscure – अस्पष्ट – Means unclear or hard to understand. Example: The professor’s obscure explanation left the students puzzled. Final Correct Sentence: "The manager's explanation was so lucid that no one had any doubts left."

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. Every day, I usually had lunch at 1 p.m.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: I usually have Explanation: • The original sentence: "Every day, I usually had lunch at 1 p.m." is awkward and uses the incorrect tense for habitual action in the present. • The adverb "usually" indicates a habitual or repeated action. • To express a habit that is true in the present, we use the simple present tense ["have"], not the past tense ["had"]. • "I usually have lunch at 1 p.m." is grammatically correct and sounds natural. • Hence, "I usually have" is the correct improvement. Correct Sentence: “Every day, I usually have lunch at 1 p.m. “

questions.question: Select the Grammatically correct sentence -
options: The number of players practice regularly.
The number of players practices regularly.
A number of player practices regularly.
A number of players practices regularly.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: The number of players practices regularly. Explanation: • The sentence is grammatically correct and follows both subject-verb agreement and tense rules. • "The number of + plural noun" [here, "players"] is a structure that requires a singular verb, even though the noun is plural. • The verb "practices" is singular and matches the singular subject "The number". • The word "regularly" is a time expression that indicates present indefinite tense, which uses the base verb for plural subjects and -s/-es for singular ones. • Option A [“practice”] is incorrect because it uses a plural verb with a singular subject. • Option C is incorrect because “player” should be plural after “a number of”. • Option D is incorrect because “a number of + plural noun” takes a plural verb, but “practices” is singular. Final Correct Sentence: "The number of players practices regularly."

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. If you miss too many classes, you may fall back in your studies.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Fall behind Explanation: The phrasal verb "fall behind" is the most appropriate choice in this sentence. It means to fail to keep up with progress, especially in studies, work, or payments. “Fall back” is incorrect in this context as it generally means to retreat or move backward physically, not academically. Meanings and examples of the options: • Fall behind – पिछड़ जाना – To not keep up with others or with a schedule Example: "She fell behind in her homework after being sick for a week." • Fall for – मोहित होना / धोखे में आना – To be deceived or to fall in love Example: "He fell for a scam and lost his money." • Fall out – झगड़ना / बाहर गिरना – To quarrel or to drop out Example: "They fell out over a misunderstanding." • Fall back – पीछे हटना – To retreat or move backward Example: "The soldiers fell back to a safer position." Final Correct Sentence: "If you miss too many classes, you may fall behind in your studies."

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct. We all hope ___________ a better India.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: For Explanation: • The verb "hope" is always followed by the preposition "for" when it expresses a desire or expectation about something. • So, "hope for a better India" is the grammatically and contextually correct phrase. • "For" properly connects the emotion of hope with the object of that hope. Examples: • We hope for peace and prosperity. • The students are hoping for good results. Corrected Sentence: "We all hope for a better India."

questions.question: Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: a RTI application Explanation: • The use of the article "a" before "RTI" is incorrect. • Although "RTI" starts with the consonant letter R, it is pronounced beginning with a vowel sound. • The article "an" is used before words or abbreviations that begin with a vowel sound. Examples: • She submitted an RTI to the department. • He is working in an MNC. Corrected Sentence: Ramesh filed an RTI application to get the information.

questions.question: Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph: A. Not doing something will always be faster than doing it. B. For example, there is no meeting that goes faster than not having a meeting at all. C. The same philosophy applies in other areas of life. D. The ultimate productivity hack is saying no.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: DACB Explanation: Let’s break it down step by step: • D starts the paragraph by introducing the main idea: "The ultimate productivity hack is saying no." • A follows by supporting the idea with a general statement: "Not doing something will always be faster than doing it." • C continues the thought and broadens the scope: "The same philosophy applies in other areas of life." • B concludes with a specific example to illustrate the point: "For example, there is no meeting that goes faster than not having a meeting at all." Final Paragraph: The ultimate productivity hack is saying no. Not doing something will always be faster than doing it. The same philosophy applies in other areas of life. For example, there is no meeting that goes faster than not having a meeting at all.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of the given sentence. The chef cooked a delicious meal.
options: A delicious meal is cooked by the chef.
A delicious meal has been cooked by the chef.
A delicious meal was cooked by the chef.
A delicious meal was being cooked by the chef.
questions.explanation: Explanation: • The original sentence is in past indefinite tense [cooked]. • The correct passive voice form for past indefinite is: was/were + past participle. • "Meal" is singular, so we use "was cooked." Final Sentence: A delicious meal was cooked by the chef.

questions.question: Change the narration of the given sentence. The teacher said to me, "Do not speak during the exam."
options: The teacher told me not to speak during the exam.
The teacher told me not speaking during the exam.
The teacher ordered not to speak during the exam.
The teacher said not to speak during the exam.
questions.explanation: Explanation: • The original sentence is a negative imperative, instructing someone not to do something. • In reported speech [indirect narration], we change the imperative to a reported command by using the verb "told". • The structure for indirect speech in this case is: "told + object + not to + base verb" (not to speak). • "Not speaking" [option B] is incorrect because it uses the gerund form, which is not used for reported commands. • "Ordered" [option C] would be used in a stronger context, but "told" is the more appropriate choice for a mild command. • "Said" [option D] does not work in this context as it does not include the appropriate form of the verb ["told" is more fitting here for commands]. Final Sentence: The teacher told me not to speak during the exam.

questions.question: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Sunday that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court ___1___ uniform rules for overage or ‘end of life’ vehicles in the national capital that are ___2___ line with the regulations followed across the country. Lieutenant-Governor Vinai Kumar Saxena has also written to Ms. Gupta, urging her government to file a review petition in the ___3___ court. He said it is “irrational” that a 10-year-old diesel vehicle is deemed to have reached the end of its life in Delhi while remaining “roadworthy” in other parts of the country. A 2018 Supreme Court judgment had ___4___ diesel vehicles older than 10 years and petrol vehicles older than 15 years in Delhi as part of efforts to ___5___ vehicular pollution. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The answer is A because "seeking" is the most appropriate verb in this context. It implies that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court to request or obtain uniform rules for overage or 'end of life' vehicles in the national capital. This verb fits well with the idea of approaching a higher authority for a specific purpose. Let’s see why other options are wrong: -"asking", is somewhat similar to seeking but is less formal and precise in this context. While it's not entirely incorrect, "seeking" is a better fit for formal or official actions like approaching the Supreme Court. - "probing", implies investigating or examining closely, which doesn't fit the context of the sentence. The sentence is about the government approaching the court for a specific regulatory change, not investigating something. - "drafting", implies creating or writing the rules, which is the opposite of what the sentence intends. The sentence implies that the government wants the Supreme Court to create or implement uniform rules, not that they are creating the rules themselves to present to the court.

questions.question: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Sunday that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court ___1___ uniform rules for overage or ‘end of life’ vehicles in the national capital that are ___2___ line with the regulations followed across the country. In this context, it implies that the rules for overage or 'end of life' vehicles in the national capital are in accordance with the regulations followed across the country. The phrase "in line with" is commonly used to indicate conformity or alignment with standards, rules, or practices.

questions.question: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Sunday that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court ___1___ uniform rules for overage or ‘end of life’ vehicles in the national capital that are ___2___ line with the regulations followed across the country. A 2018 Supreme Court judgment had ___4___ diesel vehicles older than 10 years and petrol vehicles older than 15 years in Delhi as part of efforts to ___5___ vehicular pollution. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 3 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The answer is C because "apex" refers to the highest or most superior point of something, which in this context would be the Supreme Court, the highest court in the country. The Lieutenant-Governor is urging the government to file a review petition in the Supreme Court, so describing it as the "apex court" is fitting. Let’s see why other options are wrong: - "zenith", typically refers to the highest or most superior point in the sky or in a particular field or activity. While it implies a peak, "apex" is more commonly used to describe hierarchical structures like courts. - "largest", doesn't necessarily imply the highest authority. The Supreme Court is not just the largest court but the highest in the judicial hierarchy. - "nadir", refers to the lowest or most inferior point, which is the opposite of what is intended here. The Supreme Court is the highest authority in the judicial system, not the lowest.

questions.question: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Sunday that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court ___1___ uniform rules for overage or ‘end of life’ vehicles in the national capital that are ___2___ line with the regulations followed across the country. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 4 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The answer is B because "banned" fits well in the context of the sentence, which mentions a Supreme Court judgment related to diesel and petrol vehicles. The sentence implies that the court judgment had prohibited or restricted the use of diesel vehicles older than 10 years and petrol vehicles older than 15 years in Delhi. "Banned" accurately conveys this meaning of prohibition or restriction. Let’s see why other options are wrong: - "permitted", implies allowing something, which is the opposite of what the sentence intends. The judgment is about restricting vehicle usage, not allowing it. - "ignored", implies paying no attention to something, which doesn't fit the context. The judgment is an active measure to address vehicular pollution, not ignoring the issue. - "debarred", while similar to "banned" in some contexts, often implies disqualifying or preventing someone from participating or accessing something. "Banned" is a more direct and fitting choice for prohibiting vehicles based on age.

questions.question: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Sunday that the BJP government will approach the Supreme Court ___1___ uniform rules for overage or ‘end of life’ vehicles in the national capital that are ___2___ line with the regulations followed across the country. Lieutenant-Governor Vinai Kumar Saxena has also written to Ms. Gupta, urging her government to file a review petition in the ___3___ court. He said it is “irrational” that a 10-year-old diesel vehicle is deemed to have reached the end of its life in Delhi while remaining “roadworthy” in other parts of the country. A 2018 Supreme Court judgment had ___4___ diesel vehicles older than 10 years and petrol vehicles older than 15 years in Delhi as part of efforts to ___5___ vehicular pollution. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 5 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The answer is C because "abate" means to reduce or decrease the severity or intensity of something. In this context, the Supreme Court judgment aimed to reduce vehicular pollution by restricting the use of old diesel and petrol vehicles in Delhi. "Abate" fits perfectly with the idea of reducing or mitigating pollution. Let’s see why other options are wrong: - "incite", means to provoke or stir up, which is the opposite of what the judgment intends. The goal is to reduce pollution, not provoke or increase it. - "amplify", means to increase or make something louder or stronger, which also doesn't fit the context. The aim is to decrease pollution, not amplify it. - "deal", is too vague and doesn't convey the specific action of reducing pollution. While "deal with" could imply addressing the issue, "abate" directly conveys the intention of reducing pollution.
